title: DNA Extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5fl4u","text":"The goal is to extract DNA from plant leaves using a microneedle patch.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place the microneedle patch between the base and the midrib of the leaf and apply pressure for a few seconds.
Carefully remove the microneedle and put is in a petri dish.
Add 100uL of EB buffer on the microneedle patch using a pipet, and then put the EB buffer and DNA in a tube.
The DNA is ready for amplification !
creator: Dana Mozaffari
